```ruby
class EnlightenSystemsAPI
  require 'json'
  require 'net/http'

  BASE_URL = 'https://api.enlighten.com/v1'

  def initialize(api_key)
    @api_key = api_key
  end

  def get_performance_data(system_id)
    uri = URI("#{BASE_URL}/systems/#{system_id}/performance?api_key=#{@api_key}")
    response = Net::HTTP.get(uri)
    JSON.parse(response)
  end
end

class PVWattsAPI
  require 'json'
  require 'net/http'

  BASE_URL = 'https://developer.nrel.gov/api/pvwatts/v6.json'

  def initialize(api_key)
    @api_key = api_key
  end

  def estimate_production(system_params)
    uri = URI("#{BASE_URL}?api_key=#{@api_key}")
    response = Net::HTTP.post(uri, system_params.to_json, "Content-Type" => "application/json")
    JSON.parse(response.body)
  end
end
```
